export class EditRoomTileMessageComposer{/**
     * Live-edit a single room tile.
     * @param x Tile X (grid coord)
     * @param y Tile Y (grid coord)
     * @param height Height char: 'x' | '0'..'9' | 'A'..'Z'
     * @param isDoor If true, also set the door to (x, y)
     * @param doorDir Door direction (0–7)
     */constructor(x,y,height){let isDoor=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:false;let doorDir=arguments.length>4&&arguments[4]!==undefined?arguments[4]:0;this._data=void 0;// Server typically expects numbers for booleans
const doorFlag=isDoor?1:0;this._data=[x,y,height,doorFlag,doorDir];// Optional: remove in production
console.log('[📤] EditRoomTileMessageComposer packet sent:',this._data);}getMessageArray(){return this._data;}dispose(){return;}}
